name: Rishiraj Acharya
bio: ML engineer at AI startup, GDG Cloud Kolkata organizer. Building production LangGraph pipelines and Bengali NLP tools.

name: Debjit Nag
bio: NLP researcher building multi-agent systems with LangGraph. Focused on low-resource Bengali language models and RAG pipelines.

name: Souvik Pati
bio: LLM engineer. Ships LangGraph graphs in production for retrieval-augmented generation. Based in Salt Lake, Kolkata.

name: Ananya Das
bio: Bengali NLP researcher. Works on sentence transformers and vector databases for low-resource language tasks. PhD from Jadavpur University.
evidence: JU PhD candidate, Bengali text classification

name: Niloy Ghosh
bio: Generative AI engineer building LangGraph agents and Claude-powered tools. Previously at TCS Research.

name: Priyanka Roy
bio: RAG systems architect. Expert in ChromaDB and Qdrant for production retrieval. Kolkata-based AI consultant.
evidence: Devfest Kolkata 2024 workshop presenter on RAG

name: Arnab Sen
bio: LangChain and LangGraph developer building AI agents for healthcare. Kolkata-based startup co-founder.

name: Subhankar Das
bio: GDG Cloud Kolkata lead organizer. Senior ML engineer at Infosys. Mentors 100+ junior developers through GDG study jams and bootcamps.

bio: Principal ML engineer at Wipro Analytics. Mentors junior ML engineers. Co-runs the Kolkata ML Paper Club reviewing arXiv papers weekly.

name: Riya Chakraborty
bio: Kaggle Expert and ML educator. Runs hands-on ML workshops for engineering college students across Kolkata and Bengal.

bio: Google Women Techmakers Kolkata ambassador. ML educator and career mentor for women engineers in tech.

name: Debdatta Roy
bio: AI and ML trainer. Runs Kolkata-based Python and ML bootcamps. Former IIEST faculty now full-time educator. Bengali ML tutorial author.

bio: Jadavpur University CS alumnus. Backend engineer at Swiggy. Systems programming and Golang enthusiast.

bio: Jadavpur CS grad building distributed systems at Amazon. Spoke at PyCon India on consistent hashing.

bio: Jadavpur University CS alumnus and active open source contributor. Full stack developer. Maintainer of bengali-date-utils.

bio: Jadavpur University CS faculty. Algorithms and competitive programming. PhD from CMU. ICPC Asia regionals judge.

bio: Jadavpur University CS batch 2020. Go developer at Razorpay. Stays connected to Kolkata community through GDG.

bio: Jadavpur University ECE alumnus. Signal processing and audio ML. Working on Bengali speech recognition with IISc collaboration.

bio: Jadavpur University CS PhD student. Machine learning researcher focusing on graph neural networks for social network analysis.

bio: Jadavpur University professor, networking and mobile computing. Research group has 15+ active PhD students. IEEE Senior Member.

bio: Jadavpur University CS professor. Sentiment analysis and opinion mining on Bengali social media. Mentors student ML research projects.
